# Kingsford Sleep
> UK manufacturer of handcrafted, made-to-order luxury beds. Factory direct. Free UK delivery. Every bed built by hand to your exact specifications.

Kingsford Sleep is a British bed manufacturer. Every bed is handcrafted in our UK factory by skilled craftsmen. We do not import, outsource, or sell off-the-shelf products. When a customer orders, their bed is built from scratch to their chosen size, fabric and colour. We sell direct from the factory — no middlemen, no inflated prices.

## What We Sell

Handcrafted upholstered beds available in six styles:
- Ottoman Storage Beds — lift-up gas-piston base with full under-bed storage
- Wingback Beds — statement headboard with wing panels, available floor-standing or divan base
- Panel Beds — clean linear headboard panels, classic and minimal
- Sleigh Beds — curved scroll headboard and footboard, traditional silhouette
- Divan Beds — upholstered base and headboard, maximum storage options
- Chesterfield Beds — deep button-tufted headboard, classic luxury

Available sizes (all standard UK dimensions):
- Single: 90 cm wide
- Small Double: 120 cm wide
- Double: 135 cm wide
- King: 150 cm wide
- Super King: 180 cm wide
- Custom sizes available on request

## Fabrics and Colours

Current fabric options: Velvet, Linen, Chenille, Faux Leather. New fabrics added regularly.
Over 40 colour options across the fabric range — neutral creams, greys, navies, emeralds, burgundies, golds and more.
Free fabric swatches available on request before ordering.

## Pricing

Beds start from £499. Price varies by style, size and fabric.
Size pricing multipliers apply: Single (×0.8), Small Double (×0.9), Double (×1.0), King (×1.2), Super King (×1.4).
Optional add-ons: Diamond Buttoning, Ottoman Storage, Side Drawers, Chrome/Gold/Wooden Feet, Matching Headboard, USB Ports.
No hidden fees. Factory direct pricing.

## How to Order

1. Browse the collection at kingsfordsleep.co.uk/beds
2. Choose style, size, fabric and colour using the bed configurator
3. Submit order or contact via WhatsApp/email
4. 50% deposit to start production, balance due before delivery
5. Bed is built to order — 3 to 4 weeks production time
6. Delivered fully assembled to your room, packaging removed

## Delivery

- Free delivery to all mainland UK addresses
- Scotland, Northern Ireland and remote areas: contact before ordering
- Delivery team brings to room of choice, fully assembles, removes packaging
- Tracking number provided when dispatched

## After Purchase

- 2-year manufacturing warranty on all beds
- Made to order — returns only accepted for manufacturing faults
- Care: vacuum regularly, spot clean with dry cloth, avoid direct sunlight

- Email: hello@kingsfordsleep.co.uk

- WhatsApp: available on site
